metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the real-estate-marketplace domain.

children.name: Homepage
children.description: Introductory pages of Brand_I brands, serving marketing data and (personalized) links to other critical elements of the site (detail pages, search...)

internalModules.title: Experience Shell and Navigation
internalModules.description: Provides the primary user flow, navigation, and page composition for Homepage.

internalModules.title: Session and Personalization State
internalModules.description: Manages user context, preferences, and personalized behavior within Homepage.

internalModules.title: Content and Interaction Orchestration
internalModules.description: Coordinates the content blocks, tasks, and interaction logic shown by Homepage.

interfaces.title: User Experience Interface
interfaces.description: Primary user-facing interface delivered by Homepage.

interfaces.title: Experience Backend API
interfaces.description: API surface used to assemble state and content for Homepage.

interfaces.title: Interaction Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface capturing user actions and journey signals from Homepage.

children.name: Search Engine Results Page (SERP)
children.description: Ability to search for classifieds through diverse criteria (by location, price range, amenities, on map...)

internalModules.title: Catalog and Index Pipeline
internalModules.description: Builds and refreshes the searchable corpus, facets, and metadata used by Search Engine Results Page (SERP).

internalModules.title: Ranking and Recommendation Engine
internalModules.description: Ranks results or recommendations surfaced by Search Engine Results Page (SERP).

internalModules.title: Merchandising and Tuning Controls
internalModules.description: Lets operators tune relevance, boosts, and presentation behavior in Search Engine Results Page (SERP).

interfaces.title: Search and Query API
interfaces.description: API used to query results, recommendations, or catalog slices from Search Engine Results Page (SERP).

interfaces.title: Search Experience Interface
interfaces.description: User-facing search or browse experience rendered by Search Engine Results Page (SERP).

interfaces.title: Catalog Update Feed
interfaces.description: Event or ingestion feed used to refresh searchable content inside Search Engine Results Page (SERP).

children.description: As a target tech solution: Build a country-specific CRM based on salesforce to be used across all Brand_I brands within this country. For legal reasons - data needs to be split between B2B and B2C customers using different Salesforce instances.

internalModules.title: Contract and Mapping Layer
internalModules.description: Maintains schemas, field mappings, and versioned contracts used by B2C CRM.

internalModules.title: Transformation and Routing Engine
internalModules.description: Transforms messages and routes requests or events through B2C CRM.

internalModules.title: Access and Observability Controls
internalModules.description: Applies authentication, throttling, retry handling, and monitoring for B2C CRM.

interfaces.title: Inbound API
interfaces.description: API entry point used to submit requests or payloads into B2C CRM.

interfaces.title: Outbound Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event or webhook surface used by B2C CRM to publish downstream updates.

interfaces.title: Partner Connector Surface
interfaces.description: Connector interface for external systems exchanging data through B2C CRM.

children.name: Authentication Service
children.description: Ability to manage actors (seeker, owner, intermediary) accounts (user registration, sign-in, forget the password, …)

internalModules.title: Identity and Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Authentication Service.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and Lifecycle Management
internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Authentication Service.

internalModules.title: Audit and Compliance Controls
internalModules.description: Records security-relevant actions and compliance evidence produced by Authentication Service.

interfaces.title: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for authentication, authorization, or account checks exposed by Authentication Service.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Authentication Service.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes security and compliance signals from Authentication Service.
